name_cn:
🌟New Hobo➕D buckle (Gold hardware)
Made of imported original parachute fabric, cross-grain calfskin handle. Lightweight and practical Hobo underarm bag. Super simple and stylish, small/lightweight/capacious/easy to match. Can be carried by hand. Super practical!
Size: 22x12x6cm
Style: 1NE204
